<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# I need to check current state and cursor position
seg = current_frame.segmentation

# Check cursor
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"Cursor: id={n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check all bottom hashes
print("\nCurrent bottom hashes:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and 42 <= n['id'] <= 53:
        h = n['hash']
        top_S = {'5ff2569c3387e9ef': 1, 'eedf8832739058cd': 3, 'd868ee08e5af84ee': 13, 
                 'e668cf5bf91b30aa': 15, '598e9cbf8e60024f': 26, '88e45be75860ff8c': 28}
        top_P = {'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0': 2, 'd38ad0a046a963a0': 4, 'fb80c9b281b063da': 14,
                 'f4469c244897540c': 16, '12ee96cc93cd3e0a': 27, 'b4edb3faf810133b': 29}
        match = ""
        if h in top_S: match = f"-> top S {top_S[h]}"
        elif h in top_P: match = f"-> top P {top_P[h]}"
        print(f"  B[{n['id']}]: {h} {match}")

# Cursor is at col 1 (from last action batch)
# Col 1 P (B[50]) = 4d73d89741016e33, need to reach fb80c9b281b063da
# Cycle: 4d73d89741016e33 -> f374da1846c5053c -> 9f50b4668dbfcf71 -> 886b69c2697662e9 -> 3ad80649032c6805 -> fb80c9b281b063da
# Need 5 UPs

# Press UP 5 times to reach the match
action(['UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("\nAfter 5 UPs:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and 42 <= n['id'] <= 53:
        h = n['hash']
        top_S = {'5ff2569c3387e9ef': 1, 'eedf8832739058cd': 3, 'd868ee08e5af84ee': 13, 
                 'e668cf5bf91b30aa': 15, '598e9cbf8e60024f': 26, '88e45be75860ff8c': 28}
        top_P = {'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0': 2, 'd38ad0a046a963a0': 4, 'fb80c9b281b063da': 14,
                 'f4469c244897540c': 16, '12ee96cc93cd3e0a': 27, 'b4edb3faf810133b': 29}
        match = ""
        if h in top_S: match = f"-> top S {top_S[h]}"
        elif h in top_P: match = f"-> top P {top_P[h]}"
        print(f"  B[{n['id']}]: {h} {match}")

print(f"\nResult: {last_action_result}")

</function>
